data_json.location: Santo Tomás, Menorca, Balearic Islands, Spain
data_json.description: Design-driven adults-only luxury resort on the south coast of Menorca. Net-zero carbon. 159 rooms, La Sal fine-dining plus SAmardor plus Nivi plus Cru restaurants, Thai Spa with hydrothermal circuit, three pools including adult-only rooftop heated pool.

audience: mix of luxury couples, honeymoon anniversary celebrators, affluent families with older children, Melia Rewards loyalty members, and a few business travelers
